titleStmt.title: SII 27.152: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 152. (A.R. No. 278 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in the house of Subbarāya Bhaṭṭa near the Vināyaka temple.

This record registers gifts of lands after purchase and income from land-taxes, for the chhatra (feeding house) of the maṭha attached to the temple of Vināyakadēva of Kellaṁgeṟe at Chauḷiyakēri by Mābaḷa-seṭṭi, on the occasion of a lunar ecplise, when Paṇḍaridēvavoḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya under the command of the king and Singaṇa-daṇāyaka.

It is dated Śaka 1416 (1417 current), Ānanda, Kārttika śu. 1, Sunday. The details given are irregular, the tithi corresponding to 1494 A.D., October 30 when the weekday was Thursday. In the next year i.e., Śaka 1417, Rākshasa, the tithi fell on sunday, f.d.t. ·25, October 18, 1495 A.D. No lunar eclipse occurred in this year before the month of Kārttika. But there was a solar eclipse in the year Ananda (1494 A.D.) on Monday, September 15.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ śrī sarasvatyēṁ namaḥ śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ nirvighnamastu . nama
stuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śa
kavaruśa 1416 saṁdu hadinēḷaneyavartamāna Ānaṁdasaṁvaccharada kārtika śuddha pāḍya Ādivāradalū śrī maṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa virūpākṣa mahārāyaru vijayanagariya rājadhāniyalu
sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁda samastavaṁrnna dharmāśramaṁgaḷanū pratipālisuttalū A vi
rūpākṣa mahārāyara siṁgaṁdaṇāyakara nirūpadiṁda paṁḍaridēva voḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kā
ladalū cauḷiyakēriya kellaṁgeṟeya vināyaka dēvara saṁnidhiyalli beṁmaṁṇa bhaṁḍāriyara maga cauḷiyakēri
ya baṟkāṟana baḷiya mabaḷaseṭṭiyarū somōparāga puṁṇyakāladali dhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreya neṟadu māḍida
maṭhada chatrada śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare haṁdeṭenavoḷage beṁgareya bācaṇabāsuri Ūrāḷa
ramaga saṁkara bāsuriya kayya mābaṇa seṭṭiyaru mūlavakoṁḍa bāḷina vivara maneya
bāgila bāḷina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu viṭhaṇa bāsuriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu Ūrāḷara taṁma gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu viṭhaṇabāsuriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu baḍagalu viṭhaṇa bāsuriyagaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷage bi
ttuva bhūmihāne 37 gadde mattaṁ teṁkalu mūḍalu bācaṇa bāsuriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu brahmasvada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beṭṭeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu Ūrāḷara ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yīṁtī catussīme yidara voḷage bittuva bhūmi hāne 32 gadde yī ye
raḍu ṭhīūkūḍi muḍe 1 . 6gade yī taḷavige baṁdakeṟi voṁdu sahitaū bāḷige gēṇi prativaruṣa
1 kkaṁ teṟusahavāgi Akki muḍi 16 . mattaṁ Ayirōḍiya voḷage Alaseya beṭṭinalū gōveya
mādaṇahebārana dugavīraṇa hebārana mūla malaṇa seṭiyara Aruvoka mūlādiya
bāḷina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu hakka daṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu keṟiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ taṁma ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ nārāyaṇa hebbārana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ariyara sōmadēvana gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu nārāyaṇa hebbārana makkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁda
voḷage bittuva bhūmi nāghaṁḍugadalu muḍi 6 . gaddeyiṁ kuggidagade mūvatta Ayidu hāne saha
yābāḷa Aruvāra mūlādiyāgirddu biṭṭa ga 400 Akṣāradalu nānūṟu gēṇi
prativaruṣa 100 Akkimuḍi 2 ga mattaṁ haribeṭina voḷage nāraṇa bāsuriya maga saṁkara bāsuri
ya mūla mācaṇaseṭiyara Aruvāra mūlādiya bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu karttara he
bārasaṁkara bāsuriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu meleya Abbeya kruṣṇabāsuriya gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kruṣṇabāsuriya haṁdeya ri na Aruvāradagaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍa
galu saṁkara bāsuriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage bittuva bhūmi hāne
6 gadde grāmiṇi kāreṁtara kayyalū beleyakoṭṭu koṁḍa kāhu muḍi5 hāne 13 yiṣṭanū biḍā
ruvāruvāgi ṁdalu parivarttanakke saluvā doḍḍavaraha ga 40 yā bāḷamēle mūlādi
yāgi koṁḍadu varaha ga 13 Ubhayaṁ varaha ga 53 Akṣaradalū Ayivattamūṟu varaha yī bā
ḷa mēle naḍava ru prati varuṣa 1 kaṁ Akki muḍi 7 . �yo taḷada moḷe bittisi Ariyettisikoḍuvadakkaṁ mū
lādiya bariya naḍasikoḍōdakkaṁ . Aṁhoṇa bācaṇa bāsuriya maga saṁkara bāsuri �yo mūlādiya
muḍi Akki mu 11 sikidare yi bāḷanu kāhanu mūlava yetisi koḍuva saṁkara bāsiri grāmiṇi kāhu
varige karadara nālkuhaṇava tettu bāḷuvadu mattaṁ �yo bāḷamēlū kāhina mēlū koṭṭahoṁnige yī mūva
ttu hāne gaddeyadatti Akkinikkavarige meyisālavāgi nāraṇabāsiriya Ūrāḷa saṁkara bāsiri koḍu
va Akki muḍi 20 Adakke AdaAṟikeya bācaṇa bāsiriya maga saṁkara bāsuri yī bāḷamecisuva
Akki yippattu muḍe Akkiya tettu bāḷa Ayirōḍiya gā ṁda mādaṇa hebārana dattada
viṭhaṇahebārana kayya Aruvāramūlādiya māḍikoṁḍu bāḷi Adahoṇe ttada mādhava hebbā
rana maga bācaṇahebāra hebārana kaṭṭina teṁka gēśvarada voḷage
saṁkara seṭṭiya kayyalū mācaṇa seṭṭiyaru biḍāruvāra mū
lādi koṁḍabāḷina catussīmeya vivara geyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu hegaḍeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ayyappana gaḍiyiṁ seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
yyana gaḍiyiṁda siddhanātha dēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ saṁkaraseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷage bittuva bhūmi nāghaṁḍugadalu mu
ḍe 5 �yo Ayidu mūḍegaddeya biḍāruvāruvāgi biṭu kaḍe daru bārakūra parivartanake saluva
vahaga 50 Akṣaradalu Ayivattu varaha �yovarahage baḍḍi prativaruṣa 1 kaṁ Akkimu 7 mattaṁ mūlādiyāgi tegadu ko
ṁ ḍa varaha 125 yī varahage baḍḍi Akkimuḍi 2 Ubhayaṁ Aruvāra mūlādi sahavāgi doḍa varaha ga 75 baḍḍi Akki rmu
Aruvāra mūlādige Adahāṇi kruṣṇamayyana maga viṣṇumayiyyaru kālakālava Aḷiyana
koḍuva voṁdēkālada Arisi dara Akiya koṁḍu ka va koḍudu mattaṁme ṇama
yiṁge nāraṇaseṭiyara moṁḍugaḷa magadāruva saṁkaraseṭṭi tānu badda brahmādāyada mūla
da bāḷu vōṇiya sidhanāthadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu sithanātha dēvara kōṭinātha seṭiya gaḍiyi
ṁdaṁ baḍagalu kēśava hoḷara nāyara mūlada gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu mattaṁ kēśava hoḷara nāyara mūlada
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo nālku gaḍiya voḷage mane maneṭhāu kaḷa mara phalasaha gade muḍe hā 20 hānegaḷa
Aruvāra yirisi karaṁkoṁḍa doḍavaraha ga 7 . mūladiyamēle 12 . Aruvāmūḍe saha doḍevara ga 10
�yo hoṁnige baḍi nāghaṁḍugadalu Akimuḍi 1 yi Akkiya naḍasi koḍuvaṁtāgi Adahāṇi puruṣōttama kē
śava hoḷaramaga kruṣṇahoḷa yi Akki sirivara nāyaka mūlava sākṣava nikkuva . mattaṁ hebārana katina teṁka ha
da hadēśvaradoḷage mabaṇaseṭṭiyarige nāraṇaseṭṭiyara moṁḍa nāruseṭṭi koṭṭa patrada kramaveṁteṁ
dare tānubadda braṁhmadāyada mūlada bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu nāruseṭiya taṁnagaḍi saṁkara
seṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hiriyatōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Aṁṇiseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu nāraṇahoḷara mararagaḍimayaragaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nāluku gaḍiya voḷage bittuva bhūmi makkiya
bāḷu beṭumane Aḍisaha biḍāruvāravāgi biṭu karaṁgoṁḍa ghaṭiga 148 �yo hoṁnige baḍi Akkimūḍe 8 yīha
tra Adahoṇi vihahoḷana maga kēśava hoḷanuṁ mahoḍe kaṭṭigeṁḍu bedasala mūladiya hoṟage bariya saladu
yeṟadare koṭare Ardhaṇaḷiyārada bācaṇa Upādhyara maga māraṇa Upādhyaramūla mūḍa bayaloḷa
ge sōdireya gaddeya gaḍiya vivara śaṁkara Upādhyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu koṭaru dēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
baḍagalu mādaherana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu śēśakāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ vo
ḷage hāne 20 gadde mattaṁhorana gaddeya gaḍiya vivara koṭara dēvara devasadiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu nāraṇa U
pādhyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu saṁkara Upādhyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu giḷiyāda dēvara devasadiṁ
teṁkalu �yo nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷage 25 hānegadde A bāḷige baṁda kāhu Aṁṇa heraḷakayya beleko
ṭu koṁḍa kāhu muḍe 1 sahavāgi biḍāruvāra mūlādiyāgi beṭukaraṁ koṁḍa vaga 11 bāci Upādhya
naho naḍasikoḍuva Akki muḍe 2 yi bāḷa mūlakoṁḍa mayi sālade va ga 2 baḍi Akki muḍi 1 hāne 10 mattaṁ
mayisāla Aki muḍi 13 �yo bāḷa Arthavakoṁḍu mayisālada hoṁna Akki muṁtāgi koḍuva mattaṁ
haṁdeṭina nārāyaṇa bāsuriya maga vīraṇa bāsuriya mūladabāḷa catusīmeya vivara saṁkara bāsuriya kartta
na gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu saṁkarabāsiriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu saṁkara bāsuriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu Aṁ
ṇa bāsuriya bācaṇabāsuri yibaragaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage bittuva hāne 40 yidake
baṁ kāraṁtara kayya belege koṁḍakāhu muḍi 3 sahita yī bāḷa biḍāruvāruvāgi mabaṇaseṭiyari
ge biṭṭukaraṁ koḍadu bārahara parivartanake saluva kāṭi ga 100 yi bāḷa mēle mūlādi va ga 12 �yo bāḷa Aruvāra mū
lādige hoṇecaṁkereya bāvanamaga Ūrāḷa saṁkara bāsuri yidake baḍḍi Aruvārakke Akkimuḍi 7 mūlā
dige Akki muḍi 2 Ubhayaṁ Akkimuḍi 9 Aṁtu Akki muḍi 77 . gevecca prativaruṣa 1 kaṁ maṭhada dharṁmake cina 6 kaṁ
Akimuḍi 60 toḷaśādēviyarige nayivēdyake pratidina 1 kkaṁ doḍa va 12 lū va 1 kaṁ Akkimu 4 . kṣīrābdiya
pūjege mu 1 Ubhayaṁ mu 5 . sāṇiya tiṁgaḷa benakana beu ti 1 vriścika beU ti 1 Ubhayaṁ ti 2 kka vinā
yaka hōmake Aki mu 2 śanivāra yeṁṇege Amāsege dvādaśiya dōsege saha va 1 kaṁ Akki mu 3 haṁdeṭu mūlada bā
ḷa teṟage A 3 Adhikavāgi yirisida Amu 30 Aṁttumuḍi 77 . mattaṁ pāṁḍēśvarada haṁdaṭina voḷage kaḷana gōḷiyabāḷu nā
rasiṁhadēvara Ayyanavara mūla mācaṇa seṭiyara Aruvāra mūlādiya bāḷa catusīme vāsudēva nāgappana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva
lu nāraṇa seṭṭiya kariyagaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu ṇa seṭi maṁjinātha hoḷanagaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu Ayyappana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
teṁkalu yī catusīmeya voḷage muḍi 8 gade kaṭṭigeya hoḷada ra mūla �yo bāḷa Aruvāra mūlādiya Arddhava ga 50 baḍḍiprati
kkaṁ yidake naḍava dharmmaprativa 1 kkaṁ nārasihya dēvarige mosarōgarada nayivēdyake Amu 6 gōkulāṣṭamiya pūjege mu 2
Aki mu 1 [dalū Akki] Ayyanavarige Uḍugere saluva paṭṭa ḷita Ayyana Akiya yī nayivēdyada
naḍasuvaru yī śāsanada vivarada dharṁma Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍavaṁtāgi baradu naṭṭa śilāśāsana . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē
dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāssarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō haraṁti
śaṣṭirvvaruṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . yiṁtappudake mābaḷa seṭṭiyara voppa cinavara
baraha maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
